span.p: Section 372: Selling minor for purposes of prostitution, etc. (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Whoever sells, lets to hire, or otherwise disposes of any person below 21 yea...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: With intent that such person shall at any age be employed or used for the pur...
